Class SD2

algorithms.SD2

    Description
    static double
    calculateDiameter(List<Node> nodes)
    Calculates the diameter of the graph (maximum shortest path length).
    static double
    calculateRadius(List<Node> nodes)
    Calculates the radius of the graph (minimum eccentricity among all nodes).
    static Node
    findCenter(List<Node> nodes)
    Finds the center of the graph (node with minimum sum of distances to others).
    static List<Edge>
    findSD2Edges(List<Edge> mstEdges, List<Node> originalNodes)
    Finds additional edges to be added to the MST to ensure the resulting graph has a diameter of at most 2.

    Applies the Floyd-Warshall algorithm to compute all-pairs shortest paths.
    static void

    Prints the distance matrix between all pairs of nodes.

    Identifies nodes that violate the diameter-2 constraint.

  • Constructor Details

    • SD2

      public SD2()

  • Method Details

    • findSD2Edges

      public static List<Edge> findSD2Edges(List<Edge> mstEdges, List<Node> originalNodes)
      Finds additional edges to be added to the MST to ensure the resulting graph has a diameter of at most 2. Time Complexity: O(V^2 * E) where V is the number of nodes and E is the number of edges. Space Complexity: O(V^2)
      Parameters:
      mstEdges - The list of edges forming the Minimum Spanning Tree.
      originalNodes - The original list of nodes with all possible edges.
      Returns:
      A list of edges to be added to the MST to satisfy diameter-2 property.

    • satisfiesDiameter2

      public static Map<Node, List<Node>> satisfiesDiameter2(List<Node> nodes, Map<Node, Map<Node,Double>> graph)
      Identifies nodes that violate the diameter-2 constraint. A node u violates the property with another node v if their shortest path length > 2. Time Complexity: O(V * (V + E)) Space Complexity: O(V)
      Parameters:
      nodes - The list of all nodes.
      graph - The adjacency map representing the graph.
      Returns:
      A map of nodes to their unreachable (beyond distance 2) neighbors.

    • floydWarshall

      public static double[][] floydWarshall(List<Node> nodes)
      Applies the Floyd-Warshall algorithm to compute all-pairs shortest paths. Time Complexity: O(V^3) Space Complexity: O(V^2)
      Parameters:
      nodes - The list of graph nodes.
      Returns:
      A 2D array representing shortest distances between all pairs of nodes.

    • findCenter

      public static Node findCenter(List<Node> nodes)
      Finds the center of the graph (node with minimum sum of distances to others). Time Complexity: O(V^2) Space Complexity: O(V^2)
      Parameters:
      nodes - The list of graph nodes.
      Returns:
      The center node of the graph.

    • calculateDiameter

      public static double calculateDiameter(List<Node> nodes)
      Calculates the diameter of the graph (maximum shortest path length). Time Complexity: O(V^2) Space Complexity: O(V^2)
      Parameters:
      nodes - The list of graph nodes.
      Returns:
      The diameter of the graph.

    • calculateRadius

      public static double calculateRadius(List<Node> nodes)
      Calculates the radius of the graph (minimum eccentricity among all nodes). Time Complexity: O(V^2) Space Complexity: O(V^2)
      Parameters:
      nodes - The list of graph nodes.
      Returns:
      The radius of the graph.

    • printDistanceMatrix

      public static void printDistanceMatrix(List<Node> nodes)
      Prints the distance matrix between all pairs of nodes. Time Complexity: O(V^2) Space Complexity: O(V^2)
      Parameters:
      nodes - The list of graph nodes.
